citations.narrative:
The WA NPRC Contingency plan available for review at the time of inspection was not reviewed at least on an annual
basis. There are 17 months between the review in January 2024 and the last review in June 2025. An annual review of
the contingency plan helps ensure that any needed changes are made and communicated to all personnel that have a
role or responsibilities in the plan to help avoid animal discomfort, illness, injury or death in the event of an emergency or
disaster.
The registrant must ensure that the contingency plan is reviewed on at least an annual basis to confirm that it adequately
addresses the criteria listed in Section 2.38(l)(1) and must also maintain documentation of those reviews, to include any
amendments or changes made to the plan since the previous year's review.
Correct from this day forward of 18 February 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
Additional Inspectors:
Madeline Anna, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
2.38(l)(2) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The WA NPRC Contingency plan available for review at the time of inspection was not reviewed at least on an annual 
basis. There are 17 months between the review in January 2024 and the last review in June 2025. An annual review of 
the contingency plan helps ensure that any needed changes are made and communicated to all personnel that have a 
role or responsibilities in the plan to help avoid animal discomfort, illness, injury or death in the event of an emergency or 
disaster. 
 
The registrant must ensure that the contingency plan is reviewed on at least an annual basis to confirm that it adequately 
addresses the criteria listed in Section 2.38(l)(1) and must also maintain documentation of those reviews, to include any 
amendments or changes made to the plan since the previous year's review. 
 
Correct from this day forward of 18 February 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Madeline Anna, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

species.common: DOMESTIC PIG / POTBELLY PIG / MICRO PIG
